title: One in-region hospitalization, one medevac and 90 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta September 3-9
summary: During the week of September 3-9, YKHC reports one in-region hospitalization, one medevac and 90 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. One In-Region Hospitalization YKHC reports that one COVID-19 positive individual was admitted into the Yukon-Kuskokwim Delta Regional Hospital. This is the 174 th i...

title: Rick Thoman’s 100th NWS Climate Outlook Briefing
summary: Join the Alaska Center for Climate Assessment and Policy for Rick Thoman’s 100 th NWS Climate Outlook Briefing on Sept. 16 at noon. Register for the webinar online or join in person at Akasofu 407. A small celebration will be held after the webinar. For eight years, Thoman has been giving the Nation...

title: Old Harbor Townhall Meeting Cancelled 9/13/22
summary: Unfortunately, due to a COVID-19 outbreak, Koniag has cancelled the 9/13/22 Old Harbor Townhall meeting. We hope all in the community are on the mend quickly! The rest of the scheduled meetings on Kodiak Island this week will go on as planned: 9/13 Akhiok at the school 9-11 am 9/14 Larsen Bay at the...

title: USDA forecasts U.S. corn, soybean, and cotton production down from 2021
summary: Corn, soybean, and cotton production is down from 2021, according to the Crop Production report issued today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).
